stemHtml:
An aircraft's flight manual has the following data:

Distance from the datum to the leading edge of the MAC (LEMAC): 11.4 m
Distance from the datum to the trailing edge of the MAC (TEMAC): 15.8 m
The Maximum Structural Take-Off Mass (MSTOM) CG range is from 11.9 m to 14.3 m from the datum

What are the forward and aft CG limits expressed as a % MAC?
